publishedAbstract: - The `clusterversion` has an error regarding the `Cluster Operator` `storage`: ~~~ $ oc get clusterversion NAME VERSION AVAILABLE PROGRESSING SINCE STATUS version 4.3.31 True True 143m Unable to apply 4.3.33: the cluster operator storage has not yet successfully rolled out ~~~- The `Cluster Operator` `storage` has the following error message: ~~~ $ oc describe co storage [...] Message: Unable to update cluster as v1alpha1 version of volumesnapshotclasses.snapshot.storage.k8s.io, volumesnapshotcontents.snapshot.storage.k8s.io, volumesnapshots.snapshot.storage.k8s.iois detected. Remove these CRDs to allow the upgrade to proceed. [...] ~~~
publishedTitle: OpenShift 4 upgrade stuck: The cluster operator storage has not yet successfully rolled out
